<?php namespace Spatie\ErrorSolutions\SolutionProviders\Laravel; use Illuminate\Database\QueryException; use Spatie\ErrorSolutions\Contracts\HasSolutionsForThrowable; use Spatie\ErrorSolutions\Solutions\Laravel\SuggestUsingMysql8DatabaseSolution; use Throwable; class UnknownMysql8CollationSolutionProvider implements HasSolutionsForThrowable { const MYSQL_UNKNOWN_COLLATION_CODE = 1273; public function canSolve(Throwable $throwable): bool { if (! $throwable instanceof QueryException) { return false; } if ($throwable->getCode() !== self::MYSQL_UNKNOWN_COLLATION_CODE) { return false; } return str_contains( $throwable->getMessage(), 'Unknown collation: \'utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci\'' ); } public function getSolutions(Throwable $throwable): array { return [new SuggestUsingMysql8DatabaseSolution()]; } }
